name: Clear-Act: niche SKU + 8h stockout + PLATINUM + GOLD + specialty alternative (30% premium)
rubric_notes: 8h stockout, PLATINUM order in 12h, only one specialty alternative (30% premium, 3-day lead). The premium is real but the stockout is unavoidable without action. Specialty SKUs often have very thin alternative pools — that's why this remains Clear-Act despite the cost. Severity CRITICAL via the PLATINUM-in-<24h rule. Confidence MEDIUM if the Arbiter rightly hesitates over the 30% premium; HIGH if it weighs PLATINUM exposure more heavily. emergency_spot_buy is acceptable as a complement because specialty markets often have a spot tier that competes with SpecialtyMfg's quote.
